context_text: "We are all threatened," answered the tiger, "by a fierce enemy which has lately come into this forest.

context_text: "We will do that gladly," returned the tiger; and all the other beasts roared with a mighty roar: "We will!" "Where is this great spider of yours now?" asked the Lion.
